name: Deluxe Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the first 5 ingredients into a saucepan.
2. Heat and stir over medium heat until smooth.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Beat in icing sugar, corn syrup, and hot water until smooth.
5. Pour the mixture into a jar.
6. Store in the refrigerator. Makes 4 cups.
